question: Will CPI rise more than 0.8% in March 2026?
reasoning: The official BLS report released on April 10, 2026 shows March 2026 CPI increased only 0.3% on a seasonally adjusted basis, which is significantly below the 0.8% threshold needed for YES resolution. The market should resolve to NO with 100% certainty since the official data has been released and confirmed.
key_factors: Official BLS March 2026 CPI data shows 0.3% increase
Report was released on April 10, 2026 as scheduled
Market resolution criteria requires >0.8% for YES
Actual result is 0.5 percentage points below threshold
risks: Potential data revision by BLS (though rare for monthly CPI)
Market may not have updated to reflect official data release
Misinterpretation of seasonal vs non-seasonal adjustment
